appBuilder.whyAppBuilder: Why App Builder vs. Custom Dev?
appBuilder.whyDescription: Replace ad-hoc spreadsheets and one-off scripts with purpose-built apps that mirror how your teams really work. Design visually, connect data sources in minutes, and ship faster—without sacrificing governance.
appBuilder.speedDescription: Launch prototypes in hours; go live in days with templates and blocks.
appBuilder.businessDescription: Forms, roles, approvals aligned to your real process—not generic software.
appBuilder.dataDescription: Connect DBs & SaaS. Make your app the single source of truth.
appBuilder.workspacesDescription: Isolated spaces per audience. Calibrate access at workspace, page, or field level. Align collaboration without leaking sensitive data.
appBuilder.useCasesDescription: CRMs, ticketing, analytics dashboards, document portals, inventory—mobile-responsive via PWA. Roadmap: AI-generated apps.

hero.title: Custom Apps. Zero Heavy Code.
hero.subtitle: Visual Drag-and-Drop Builder
hero.description: Design responsive internal tools with pages, workflows, reports, roles, and integrations. AI-assisted builder + enterprise controls = speed with confidence.

ui.title: Visual Drag-and-Drop Builder
ui.description: Place forms, tables, charts, boards, and buttons; wire actions; set validations. Build pages without code.
ui.label: UI Blocks

flows.title: Flows & Business Rules
flows.description: Configure steps, branches, and approvals. Use time-based SLAs and escalations. Trigger actions on events.
flows.label: Flows & Rules

themes.title: Design Systems & Themes
themes.description: Apply brand colors, typography, and spacing system-wide. Keep UI consistent across workspaces.
themes.label: Themes

code.title: Extend with Code
code.description: Embed custom JS, call APIs, or write small functions where needed. No-code speed + code precision.
code.label: Custom Code

cta.title: Ready to Build?
cta.description: Start creating powerful applications today with our intuitive builder.

footer.about: Empowering learners worldwide to master English with confidence and fluency.
